user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Adatum Corporation. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-05 11:35 EST
Subject: Re: security posture Discussion - Next Steps

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-03 17:30 EST
Subject: Follow-up: security posture Review

There's been a change in our timeline for security posture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 15:51 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation security posture

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with security posture. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: security posture Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-03-07
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), Kevin (Adatum Corporation)

[00:01:15] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is security posture.

[00:07:00] Kevin (Adatum Corporation): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:10:00] Kevin (Adatum Corporation): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:16:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:20:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on timeline constraints and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:24:00] Kevin (Adatum Corporation): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:29:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on stakeholder alignment and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:34:00] Kevin (Adatum Corporation): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?
